apps.name: FlixVault Cinema
apps.description: Netflix-style movie streaming with HLS adaptive bitrate via Video.js. Stripe subscription tiers (Free/Standard/4K). TMDb API integration for metadata, poster art, and cast info. Includes continue-watching, multiple profiles, and parental controls.

apps.name: BingeRadar Discovery
apps.description: AI-powered TV show and movie recommendation engine using collaborative filtering and OpenAI embeddings. Cross-platform watchlist aggregation from Netflix, Hulu, Prime via JustWatch API. Includes mood-based filters, "surprise me" roulette, and taste-match scores.

apps.name: SeriesSync Tracker
apps.description: Trakt.tv-style episode tracking with automatic progress sync via Plex and Jellyfin webhooks. Calendar integration via Google Calendar API for upcoming episodes. Push notifications via OneSignal when new episodes air. Community ratings and spoiler-free discussion boards.

apps.name: CritiqHub Reviews
apps.description: Letterboxd-meets-Rotten-Tomatoes review platform for movies and TV shows. User reviews with spoiler tags, critic vs audience scores, and half-star ratings. OAuth via Google and Apple. Share watchlists as curated lists with custom cover art and OG meta previews.

apps.name: WatchPartyGo Live
apps.description: Teleparty-style synchronized viewing rooms with WebSocket-based playback sync. Video chat overlay via Daily.co WebRTC. Supports YouTube, Twitch embed, and self-hosted HLS streams. Emoji reactions, live polls, and integrated group chat with GIF support via Giphy API.

apps.name: SubDub Localize
apps.description: OpenSubtitles API-powered subtitle search and editor with in-browser timing sync. AI auto-translate via DeepL API for 30+ languages. Community subtitle upload and voting. SRT/VTT/ASS format conversion and style editor for font, color, and positioning.

apps.name: TrailerDrop Preview
apps.description: YouTube Data API-powered trailer aggregation with upcoming release calendars. TMDB and OMDB API for metadata enrichment. Personalized hype-score algorithm based on genre preferences and watch history. Countdown timers for theatrical and streaming release dates.

apps.name: CinemaLedger Catalog
apps.description: Plex-style personal media catalog for physical and digital collections. Barcode scanning via QuaggaJS for Blu-ray and DVD lookup against OMDB. Lending tracker, insurance valuations, and shelf-location organizer. Export collection to CSV and Notion via API.

apps.name: SceneCut Clips
apps.description: FFmpeg-powered in-browser video clipper for creating shareable GIFs and short clips from movie scenes. Cloudinary for CDN hosting and image transforms. Watermark overlays, caption generators with meme-style fonts, and direct share to Twitter/Reddit via OAuth.

apps.name: NightOwl Schedule
apps.description: TV Maze API-powered live TV and streaming schedule aggregator. Personalized prime-time planner that organizes tonight's shows across all subscribed platforms. Slack and Discord bot integration for group viewing coordination. Time-zone-aware scheduling with DVR conflict detection.
